title: plectranthus purpuratus subsp. tongaensis
intro: Plectranthus purpuratus subsp. tongaensis, also known as Tonga spurflower, is a plant species within the Lamiaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which help to soothe wounds and reduce fever. The plant's health benefits include its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to provide relief from digestive problems. The herbal preparations of Plectranthus purpuratus subsp. tongaensis often involve making teas or infusions from the leaves, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
